description: Track your workouts on your FTMS rowing machine with real-time data. Discover a simple and intuitive way to track your workouts with your FTMS rowing machine. The app features a user-friendly Material 3 interface designed to make each training session more productive and engaging. Key Features - Free Workout Mode: Access a flexible workout environment where you can view and record real-time data from your rowing machine. - Smart Overlay: Enjoy your workout videos while performance data is displayed in overlay mode, allowing you to stay focused on your workout without distractions. In this mode, you can use your Android device to navigate apps and display any content you want—the data will remain always on top, giving you simultaneous access to rowing data and your chosen content. - Training History: Analyze your past performances with a comprehensive historical section. Each workout session is detailed with total data and average values, along with zoomable graphs that show your progress over time, facilitating performance analysis.
